H.R. Interview  
 
Online Aptitude Test Round:    
 Quantitative Ability: 12 questions 
 Verbal Ability: 8 questions 
 Technical Ability: 35 questions 
Time given: 75 Min 
 

Technical Interview: An in-person interview will be scheduled for those who pass the 
online exam. During a technical interview, you will be asked questions about your 
problem-solving and analytical skills, as well as how you handle pressure and other 
difficult circumstances. 
Your ability to solve problems will also be evaluated throughout this stage of the 
process.  
You will be questioned about your prior work accomplishments and undertakings, as 
well as the tasks that you performed, the ways in which you leveraged technologies, and 
the level of success that you achieved. You should get ready by familiarizing yourself 
with the foundations of computer science. You may also anticipate questions based on 
the principles of computer science. You may anticipate questions on: 
1. Object-Oriented Programming

HR Interview: - After successfully completing the technical interview, candidates will 
go on to the next stage with HR. The primary goal of an HR interview is to determine 
whether or not an applicant is a perfect fit for a particular role based on factors 
including temperament, background, experience, and other factors. Hence, it is vital that 
you be well-prepared for your HR interview.

content:
You don’t need a minimum percentage to apply for The Infosys Certification. 
 
InfyTQ Pattern/ InfyTQ Selection Process 
1. Qualifier round 
 Qualifier Round is the first round of Infosys Certification examination. 
 It is a mandatory examination which will test your knowledge on Programming 
and Database Management and will include Aptitude questions as well. 

 Clearing the Qualifier Round ensures your eligibility to take Infosys Certification. 
2. The Certification Round 
It will have a mix of objective and hands-on questions to be answered in 3 hours. 
The questions are divided into three sections: 
 Section I – Java/Python Hands-on – 2 questions 
 Section II – Java/Python Multiple Choice Questions – 10 questions 
 Section III – Database Management Systems – 10 questions 
Important: 
 The questions will be based on the programming language (Java/Python) 
selected at the time of booking the test slot. 
 There will be no negative marking in the Certification Round examinatio

selected at the time of booking the test slot. 
 There will be no negative marking in the Certification Round examination. 
 If you score 65% or above in this round and clear a few post-round necessary 
checks, you will have the option to either appear in the Advantage Round or 
appear in a techno-behavioral interview for the Systems Engineer role at Infosys 
and become an Infosys Certified Software Programmer. 
 
3. The Advantage Round 
 Java/Python Programming Question 1 - 50 Marks 
 Java/Python Programming Question 2 - 75 Marks 
 Java/Python Programming Question 3 - 100 Marks 
Important: 
 This round is an advanced test that will assess your programming and other 
technical skills. 
 It comprises three programming-based questions of varying difficulty levels to 
be answered within three hours. 
 Each question will have a different weightage of marks. 
 You can chose any of the programming language to take Advantage Round on the 
day of the test

content:

2. Level 2 package: 7.5 LPA + 30K (Based on performance)= 7.8 LPA 
3. Level 3 package: 9.0 LPA + 30K (Based on performance)= 9.3 LPA 
 
Test pattern 
 
 
Selection process 
 
 
The toppers of Section A test will be getting opportunity for higher package. 

Toppers will undergo Section B test. Remaining candidates will undergo interviews for 
Level 1 package  
Section B: Advance Coding (60 Mins) 
Those who clear Section B test, will undergo interviews for Level 2 package. 
Level 2 package candidates will be given opportunity to appear in Super Achiever test 
followed by Drona Interview. Succesfull candidates will get Level 3 package. 
What is Drona Interview?: Top interview panelists from Persistent will interview 
candidates passing Super Achiever test.

Check below information for Recruitment process and important topics for TCS NQT 
 
TCS Ninja & Digital Hiring for 2023 batch has started! 
 TCS  has  launched  TCS  Ninja  &  Digital hiring  for  2023 Batch  Students  through 
which they will hire 2023 batch students 
 TCS  NQT  is  following  the  Integrated  Test  Pattern  (ITP)  from  this  year. TCS  ITP 
Pattern  has  been  recently  launched  by  TCS  so  that  they  can  offer  Ninja  and 
Digital Roles to students using a single test. 
 The  Important  Topics  and  number  of  questions  for  each  section  shared  in  this 
post are predicted by Talent Battle Team based on the experiences and previous 
on-campus drives conducted by TCS for Ninja and Digital Role 
 If  we  get  any more  updates  regarding  important  topics  and  the  number  of 
questions  in  each  section  we  will  immediately  update  you  on  our  social  media 
platforms.

TCS Smart Hiring 2023 Pattern & Syllabus 
11 January 2023 
 
Eligibility Criteria:  
 Degree: BCA, B. Sc (Math, Statistics, Physics, Chemistry, Electronics, 
Biochemistry, Computer Science, IT), B. Voc in CS / IT 
 Percentage:50% or 5 CGPA throughout 
 One backlog is permitted 
 Overall academic gap should not exceed 2 years 
 Only Full-Time course 
 Minimum age – 18 years and Maximum age - 28 years 
Hiring Process: 
1. In Center Online Aptitude test 
2. Interviews 
 
Test Pattern: 
There will be 3 sections in test as below. 

 Verbal Ability 
 Reasoning Ability 
 Numerical Ability 
Note: The duration of the assessment is 50 minutes 
 
Important Topics 
Verbal Ability: 
 Reading comprehension 
 Sentence correction 
 Sentence completion 
 Error Identification 
 Syno

Important: 
 Candidates will be able to move to the next section only once they finish 
particular section in sequence. 
 Candidates will not be allowed to toggle between 2 or multiple sections. 
 Total duration is 180 mins, and each section is timed. 
 Candidates who clears Online assessment except Power Coding will get a 
chance for interview of 5 LPA package [4.5 LPA + 50K retention bonus (Not 
sure)] 
 Students who clears the online assessment with Power Coding round will get a 
chance for interview of 7 LPA package [6.5 LPA + 50K retention bonus every 
year].
